scores.materiality_reasoning: Exclusive marriage vs community of wives affects bodily entitlement and reproductive rights.
scores.generality_reasoning: Marriage structure is a foundational societal axis.
scores.persistence_reasoning: The status of a wife or 'common wife' is a lifelong structural arrangement.
scores.immutability_reasoning: Women is a biologically/sex-fixed group.
scores.contemporarity_reasoning: Text discusses Zeno's 'Republic', a theoretical/past philosophical work, not current law.
scores.opinion_vs_fact_reasoning: The verbatim refers to a theoretical philosophical 'doctrine' or proposal, not actual practice.
scores.tautology_reasoning: Being a woman does not inherently imply lack of exclusive marriage rights.

scores.materiality_reasoning: Freedom and 'power of independent action' are defined as the opposite of physical slavery.
scores.generality_reasoning: Freedom is a foundational societal axis.
scores.persistence_reasoning: Wise status is a long-term attainment, though theoretically revocable if virtue is lost.
scores.immutability_reasoning: Being 'wise' is an identity acquired through training and effort.
scores.contemporarity_reasoning: Reports on the contemporary doctrines of the Stoic school during the author's era.
scores.opinion_vs_fact_reasoning: This is a purely rhetorical/philosophical assertion about the nature of freedom.
scores.tautology_reasoning: Being wise is not definitionally the same as legal freedom.

scores.materiality_reasoning: Soul survival after death is a purely spiritual/abstract resource.
scores.generality_reasoning: Covers the total outcome of an individual's existence after death.
scores.persistence_reasoning: The survival lasts until the 'general conflagration', a structural cosmic timeline.
scores.immutability_reasoning: Being 'wise' is an identity acquired through training and effort.
scores.contemporarity_reasoning: Describes active philosophical debates within the Stoic school.
scores.opinion_vs_fact_reasoning: Reports sectarian philosophical opinions on a metaphysical claim.
scores.tautology_reasoning: Wisdom does not definitionally entail post-mortem persistence.

scores.materiality_reasoning: Relates to biological reproduction and physical bodily functions.
scores.generality_reasoning: Specific to a biological/medical theory of generation.
scores.persistence_reasoning: This is treated as a lifelong biological fact of the group.
scores.immutability_reasoning: Women is a biologically/sex-fixed group.
scores.contemporarity_reasoning: Reports contemporary Stoic biological theories.
scores.opinion_vs_fact_reasoning: Reports the theory as a stated 'fact' of the school's belief system.
scores.tautology_reasoning: Female biological definition does not necessarily include 'sterile semen' in all theories.

scores.materiality_reasoning: Relates to wages and physical currency (obols).
scores.generality_reasoning: The right to retain earnings is a broad category of economic rights.
scores.persistence_reasoning: Persistence lasts for the duration of the labor contract or master-servant relationship.
scores.immutability_reasoning: Legal status of slaves/laborers is structural and hard to change.
scores.contemporarity_reasoning: Cites 'Attic law' from a significantly earlier period than the author.
scores.opinion_vs_fact_reasoning: Cites a specific statute (apophora) as a matter of legal fact.
scores.tautology_reasoning: A hired laborer or 'slave allowed to hire himself' definitionally involves wage distribution.

scores.materiality_reasoning: Direct material effect on livelihood and privacy from state inquiry.
scores.generality_reasoning: Specific recurring procedure regarding legal inquiry into income.
scores.persistence_reasoning: Relates to the period of being 'able-bodied' yet appearing poor.
scores.immutability_reasoning: Wealth bracket is a changeable but durable social identity.
scores.contemporarity_reasoning: Refers to a specific historical anecdote involving the Areopagites in Athens.
scores.opinion_vs_fact_reasoning: Reports a specific legal proceeding and court action as fact.
scores.tautology_reasoning: Being poor does not definitionally entail a loss of legal privacy.

scores.materiality_reasoning: Confiscation of inherited wealth and property is a direct material loss.
scores.generality_reasoning: The right to retain property is a foundational societal axis.
scores.persistence_reasoning: Confiscation results in a permanent loss of the resource for the individual.
scores.immutability_reasoning: Wealth bracket is a changeable/contingent social status.
scores.contemporarity_reasoning: Describes an event in the life of Zeno, centuries before the author.
scores.opinion_vs_fact_reasoning: Reported as an historical event with specific legal consequences.
scores.tautology_reasoning: Wealthy status does not definitionally entail being a target for confiscation.

scores.materiality_reasoning: Physical punishment (the lash) and corporal castigation are material bodily harms.
scores.generality_reasoning: Relates to the specific right of protection from physical abuse.
scores.persistence_reasoning: The physical event is a brief episode, though consequences may last.
scores.immutability_reasoning: Occupational role (court physician) is a durable social identity.
scores.contemporarity_reasoning: Refers to a specific historical court physician for a Ptolemaic king.
scores.opinion_vs_fact_reasoning: Reports a specific historical instance of legal/punitive action.
scores.tautology_reasoning: Being a physician does not definitionally involve receiving the lash.

scores.materiality_reasoning: Access to sacred mysteries is a social practice with legal/material consequences.
scores.generality_reasoning: Tied to specific religious institutions and rituals.
scores.persistence_reasoning: Initiation status is a long-term religious standing.
scores.immutability_reasoning: Religious initiation status is a durable but changeable category.
scores.contemporarity_reasoning: Refers to the general religious norms of the Hellenistic/Roman world known to the author.
scores.opinion_vs_fact_reasoning: States the societal and legal norm regarding impiety as fact.
scores.tautology_reasoning: The 'uninitiated' are, by definition, those without access to mysteries.

scores.materiality_reasoning: The right to own land is a tangible property entitlement.
scores.generality_reasoning: Land ownership is a foundational societal axis.
scores.persistence_reasoning: Foreign/metic status typically results in a lifelong exclusion from land ownership in a polis.
scores.immutability_reasoning: Foreign birth-status is very hard to change (requires naturalization).
scores.contemporarity_reasoning: Refers to the travels of Pythagoras in the 6th century BCE.
scores.opinion_vs_fact_reasoning: Reports the travels and historical context of foreign residency as fact.
scores.tautology_reasoning: Being a foreigner does not definitionally mean one cannot own land in every society.

scores.materiality_reasoning: Right to vote in an assembly is a legal right with direct material effect on policy.
scores.generality_reasoning: Political participation is a foundational societal axis.
scores.persistence_reasoning: Citizenship and associated voting rights are typically lifelong.
scores.immutability_reasoning: Citizenship is a legal/structural birth-status.
scores.contemporarity_reasoning: Narrates events in the life of historical Pythagoras.
scores.opinion_vs_fact_reasoning: Describes the function of the historical assembly as a factual setting.
scores.tautology_reasoning: Citizenship does not technically define 'voting' in all possible systems.

scores.materiality_reasoning: Exclusion from political and legal venues has direct material impacts on legal standing.
scores.generality_reasoning: Political participation/assembly access is a foundational societal axis.
scores.persistence_reasoning: Gendered exclusion from politics was a lifelong structural feature.
scores.immutability_reasoning: Women is a biologically/sex-fixed group.
scores.contemporarity_reasoning: Reports on the social structure of Pythagorean-era southern Italy.
scores.opinion_vs_fact_reasoning: Reports the observed social exclusion as a fact of the narrative.
scores.tautology_reasoning: Being female is not definitionally equivalent to assembly exclusion.

scores.materiality_reasoning: Bodily protection from whipping/beating is a concrete material resource.
scores.generality_reasoning: Bodily integrity is a foundational societal axis.
scores.persistence_reasoning: Protection from corporal punishment is tied to lifelong legal status (free vs. slave).
scores.immutability_reasoning: Status as 'free' is a structural legal birth-status.
scores.contemporarity_reasoning: Refers to the moral conduct of historical Pythagoras.
scores.opinion_vs_fact_reasoning: Reports the difference in standard punitive practices as a factual backdrop.
scores.tautology_reasoning: Being free does not definitionally include protection from anger/punishment.

scores.materiality_reasoning: Respect and precedence are symbolic social honours.
scores.generality_reasoning: Seniority is a broad social category affecting many interactions.
scores.persistence_reasoning: Age status moves through life stages (minor to adult to elder).
scores.immutability_reasoning: Age is a biologically/chronologically fixed status at any given moment.
scores.contemporarity_reasoning: Describes historical Pythagorean principles.
scores.opinion_vs_fact_reasoning: States the social principle of precedence as an attested moral fact.
scores.tautology_reasoning: Being young (minor) does not definitionally lack respect in all possible systems.

scores.materiality_reasoning: Independent management of valuable intellectual/physical property.
scores.generality_reasoning: Property management is a foundational societal axis.
scores.persistence_reasoning: Gender-based legal restrictions on property was a lifelong feature.
scores.immutability_reasoning: Women is a biologically/sex-fixed group.

scores.opinion_vs_fact_reasoning: Reports the anecdotal surprise at her behavior against the assumed norm.
scores.tautology_reasoning: Being a woman doesn't definitionally prevent property management.

scores.materiality_reasoning: Access to international athletic contests with material prizes and honours.
scores.generality_reasoning: Tied to a specific institution (the Olympic games).
scores.persistence_reasoning: Status changes as the minor ages into the men's category permanently.

scores.opinion_vs_fact_reasoning: Reports an historical exception/advancement in athletic records.
scores.tautology_reasoning: Minors are not definitionally eligible for men's contests.

scores.materiality_reasoning: Participation in a professional/philosophical body with social outcomes.
scores.generality_reasoning: Narrowly scoped to a specific school's internal procedures.
scores.persistence_reasoning: Exclusion was a permanent disciplinary outcome once convicted.

scores.opinion_vs_fact_reasoning: Reports the conviction and specific punishment as fact.
scores.tautology_reasoning: Being a Pythagorean does not definitionally include the right to take part in all discussions.

scores.materiality_reasoning: Access to specific knowledge/teachings within a recognized guild/society.

scores.persistence_reasoning: The exclusion was a formal law established for all future poets.

scores.materiality_reasoning: Dowry involves direct material payment/transfer of wealth for marriage.
